label: lower
headline_statement: Under Assumptions~\ref{ass:causal}--\ref{ass:local-rich}, there is a constant $c>0$, depending only on the boundedness and overlap constants in Assumptions~\ref{ass:causal} and~\ref{ass:bounded} and on the perturbation constants in Assumption~\ref{ass:local-rich}, such that every estimator $\tilde\theta_n=\tilde\theta_n(W_1,\ldots,W_n)$ satisfies \[ \sup_{P\in\mathcal{P}_n^{\mathrm{SA\text{-}CATE}}} E_P\!\left|\tilde\theta_n-\tau_P(x_0)\right| \ge c\left\{b_n+(n p_n)^{-1/2}+\sqrt{r_{g,n}r_{m,n}}\right\}. \]
